meta.title: Military Spouse Deployment Tips: 5 tips to help you get through deployment
meta.description:
It’s not just the service member who has to prepare for deployment. In fact, a spouse staying at home often needs to do just as much, or more preparation. Here are 5 tips to help get you through deployment.

Get more tips on how to prepare here:
https://bit.ly/36OSKPU

0:00 Intro
2:00 Get a Joint Account
4:16 Know What Responsibilities You'll Take Over
5:41 Get a Support System
6:22 Keep Yourself Busy
7:29 Talk to Others
